overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair and glowing green shorts walking through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The character follows a pedestrian through a bustling futuristic downtown area with towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and vibrant holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a pedestrian with green hair and backpack

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and backpack walking ahead of ego toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure with support columns spanning across the street ahead
multiple illuminated holographic advertising screens on building facades displaying various brands
metal safety barrier separating the sidewalk from a lower concrete area
yellow and black striped bollards lining the curb between sidewalk and street
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a downtown sidewalk at night, following a pedestrian with green hair. Neon billboards illuminate the left side while an elevated highway overpass looms ahead. The sidewalk is bordered by a metal railing on the right and traffic bollards on the left, with palm trees visible against the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: marked pedestrian crosswalk across multi-lane avenue

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk onto the red-painted crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
yellow van and other vehicles pass by on the left while the character crosses the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at a marked crosswalk, moving from the right sidewalk to the left side of the road

notable_agents.action: yellow delivery van driving past the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: red painted lines and textured surface marking the pedestrian crossing area
large illuminated advertisement for NiCOLA beverage featuring a stylized figure

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide multi-lane avenue using a marked crosswalk with red painted lines. Vehicles including a yellow van pass by on the left as the character moves toward the opposite sidewalk. The NiCOLA billboard becomes visible on the right side of the street as the crossing progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial downtown sidewalk with digital advertising displays

events.description: character steps onto the opposite sidewalk after completing the street crossing

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various neon advertisements and commercial storefronts on the right

entered.detail: large digital billboards and illuminated storefront displays covering the building facade
street sign indicating Senate Ave mounted on a pole near the curb

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk lined with large digital billboards and commercial advertisements. The NiCOLA billboard is now prominent on the right at close range, while the elevated highway structure shifts to the left side of the frame. The street sign for Senate Ave becomes visible as the character continues through the neon-lit downtown corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit downtown corridor as the character transitions from a sheltered sidewalk across a bustling avenue to a vibrant commercial district. It begins with the character following a green-haired pedestrian along a sidewalk bordered by metal railings and palm trees, moving toward a looming elevated highway overpass. As the character leaves the sidewalk, the scene shifts to a wide multi-lane avenue where they cross a red-marked crosswalk while a yellow van passes by. The perspective then opens up to reveal a prominent NiCOLA billboard on the right as the character reaches the opposite side of the street. Finally, the camera follows the character along this new sidewalk, passing under the shifting shadow of the highway and moving past a Senate Ave street sign amidst a dense array of glowing digital advertisements.
